questions.subject: clinical-pharmacy
questions.question: Hypertension question 1: Which action best supports long-term blood pressure control?
options: Regular follow-up and adherence to therapy
questions.correctAnswer: Regular follow-up and adherence to therapy
questions.explanation: Hypertension control improves with adherence, monitoring, lifestyle modification, and individualized pharmacotherapy.
